title: Itegeko ryo Kubungabunga Ibanga
s1_body1: pTrack ('twe', 'twacu') ni porogaramu yo gukurikirana imyanda ya plastiki yagezweho nk'umushinga wa capstone ya ALU, ubu ipiloti mu murenge wa Kimironko i Kigali, Rwanda.
s2_account_body: amazina yuzuye, aderesi ya imeyili, nomero ya telefoni, umurenge, ifoto y'umwirondoro, n'uruhare.
s2_activity_body: raporo z'imyanda (ifoto, ibisobanuro, aho uri kuri GPS, ubwoko bw'imyanda), urutonde rw'ugusubiza (ubwoko, itariki), n'amateka y'amanota y'ibihembo.
s2_technical_body: aderesi ya IP na user-agent, akoranywa gusa kubakora nk'abayobozi kandi akoreshwa gusa mu gukurikirana no kwishingira. Abakoresha bamenyeshwa ibi mbere yo guhabwa uburenganzira bwa admin.
s2_prefs_body: ururimi, ikirangantego, igenamiterere ry'amamenyesha, n'ihitamo ryo kugaragara ku rutonde.
s3_li2: Kwereka ibikorwa byawe n'amanota ku rutonde (ubyemera).
s3_li3: Guhuza imibare y'ingaruka z'umuryango yatanzwe nta mazina.
s3_footer: Ntiturinda amakuru yawe ku bantu ba gatatu cyangwa tuyakoresha mu marangamutima.
s4_body1: Amakuru abitswe kuri PostgreSQL ya Neon (AWS US East 1, N. Virginia) kandi amafoto abitswe kuri Cloudinary (yoherezwa binyuze HTTPS). Ibikarita bya JWT by'uburenganzira birangira nyuma ya amasaha 60; ibikarita by'ugusubiramo nyuma y'iminsi 7.
s4_body2: Dukoresha ubwunganizi mu nzira (TLS 1.2+), isukurwa ry'ibisohoka, n'igenamiterere ry'ingano kuri za API. Amagambo y'ibanga ashyirwa mu mfuniko ukoresheje PBKDF2-SHA256.
s5_intro: Ushobora igihe icyo ari cyo cyose:
s5_li1: Gusaba kopi y'amakuru yose dufite kuri wewe.
s5_li3: Gusaba gusibwa kwa konti yawe n'amakuru yose ahuriye nayo.
s5_li4: Gusohoka ku rutonde muri Igenamiterere → Ibanga.
s5_li5: Kuvanaho icyemezo cy'amamenyesha muri Igenamiterere → Amamenyesha.
s5_footer_pre: Kugira ngo ukoreshe uburenganzira bwawe tuandikire kuri
s6_cloudinary: ibika amafoto yohererejwe. Amafoto araboneka ku bantu bose binyuze kuri URL yayo; ntukohereze amafoto afite amakuru y'ibanga.
s6_render: ibika porogaramu yacu yo inyuma. Reba DPA ya Render ku nshingano zabo z'iyobora amakuru.
s6_maps: ihujwe kugira ngo itange inzira (ifungura hanze). Ntiturinda amakuru y'umukoresha na Google Maps.
s7_body: pTrack ntiyerekeye abana bari munsi y'imyaka 16. Ntidukoranya amakuru y'abana by'ubwenge. Niba usuzuma ko umwana wakoze konti, twandikire kandi tuzayisiba.
s8_body: Dushobora kuvugurura iri tegeko kugira ngo rihure n'impinduka mu porogaramu cyangwa amabwiriza y'amategeko. Impinduka z'ingenzi zizamenyeshwa binyuze mu porogaramu. Gukomeza gukoresha nyuma y'iminsi 30 bisobanura kwemera.
